title: Vampiric Combat - Vampirism and Better Combat Compat
description: Adds compatibility between the weapons in Vampirism and Better Combat.
body:
- Heart Seeker is given sword animations.
- Heart Striker is given claymore animations.
- The pitchfork is given spear animations.
- The stake is given soul knife animations.
- The hunter's axe is given axe animations.


Dependencies:
- Vampirism
- Better Combat
